title: Congo lakes are releasing ancient carbon, raising climate concerns, study says
description: Two large lakes in the Democratic Republic of Congo are releasing carbon that has been locked away for thousands of years in surrounding peatlands scientists said in what could pose a threat to climate stability

title: Northland Securities Forecasts Fossil Group FY2025 Earnings

title: Ancient DNA Reveals Major Ancestry Shifts in Europe
description: (MENAFN) New genetic research indicates that between 6500 and 4000 BCE, descendants of western Anatolian farmers migrated across Europe and interbred with local hunter-gatherer populations, ...

title: British Antarctic team dig deep for ancient pathogens in penguin poo
description: Scientists hope sediment preserved under the region’s lakes will help them build the first historic archive of avian pathogens
